[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001000100 3
1 0111111111 9
2 0010110110 5
3 1100111111 8
4 1110101100 6
5 1101101111 8
6 1111010011 7
7 1111111011 9

01 10 0110111111 8
12 21 1110111111 9
23 32 1110101001 6
34 43 1111101011 8
45 54 1111001011 7
56 65 1111010011 7 match 6
67 76 1011010011 6
70 07 1110111111 9

02 20 1110101101 7
13 31 1110111110 8
24 42 1101101011 7
35 53 1111101001 7
46 64 1111011011 8
57 75 1111010011 7 match 6
60 06 1111111111 a
71 17 1010010110 5

03 30 1110101101 7
14 41 1111011111 9
25 52 1111101001 7
36 63 1111111011 9 match 7
47 74 1111011011 8
50 05 0111101101 7
61 16 1011010111 7
72 27 1110111011 8

04 40 1111101111 9
15 51 0111010111 7
26 62 1111111011 9 match 7
37 73 1110111010 7
[completion]
